25/06/2025, 23:35 Beneficiary institution | AUSTRAC

ye Australian Government
AUSTRAC

Beneficiary institution

Home / Beneficiary institution

A financial institution that receives an electronic funds transfer instruction and makes the
transferred funds available to the recipient.

See

AML/CTF Act 2006 subsections 8(1), 8(2), 9(1), and 9(2)

https://www.austrac.gov.au/glossary/beneficiary-institution
